Proudly Serving Florida Since 1992

Your Premier Choice for HOA and Resort Pool Maintenance in Florida

Resort Pool Services has been proudly serving Florida since 1992. With a team of over 30 dedicated professionals, we maintain over 250 commercial pools and resorts. What sets us apart is our innovative approach, utilizing state-of-the-art computers for precise chemical management. After each service, we provide you with pictures and a full chemical readout, delivered directly to your email.

At Resort Pool Services, we specialize in providing professional pool services tailored exclusively for HOA and large vacation resorts across Florida. With over three decades of experience, we have emerged as one of Florida's leading commercial pool cleaning companies. Our dedication to excellence, state-of-the-art technology, and commitment to customer satisfaction set us apart from the competition.

We are trusted partners of some of the biggest builders in the industry, including DR Horton, Pulte, Meritage Homes, Landsea, and Hanover, among others. We also collaborate with management companies and properties of all sizes, demonstrating our adaptability and commitment to meeting your specific needs.

Commercial Pool Cleaning Services for All Budgets

Our Services

Pool Cleaning Contracts

We offer flexible service options ranging from 3 to 7 days a week. We are committed to delivering the best swimming experience. Our cutting-edge computer systems meticulously manage chemical levels, ensuring a safe and enjoyable environment for your guests. We also provide comprehensive janitorial services, dog station maintenance, and trash collection to maintain the cleanliness of your pool area.

Repairs

Resort Pool Services offers a comprehensive repair service for all your pool, spa, fountain, and splash pad needs. Whether it's a minor fix or a full-scale renovation, we have you covered. Our certified pool contractors (CPC) are experts in their field, guaranteeing the highest quality repairs. We specialize in pool pump area replacement, ensuring your equipment functions flawlessly.

Chemicals

We take chemical management seriously. Our bulk chemical delivery system is designed to keep your pool running smoothly. Our tanks are equipped to monitor daily chlorine usage and automatically request chlorine deliveries when levels reach a certain threshold. This ensures that your pool never runs out of chemicals, and our computer system optimizes chemical usage, keeping your pool's chemical balance perfect.

Customized Pool Cleaning Services

Our Process

  • Regular pool water testing and chemical adjustments
  • Skimming or vacuuming as needed
  • Thorough wall and floor brushing
  • Filter grid cleaning to maintain Health Department standards
  • Tile cleaning as required
  • Ongoing computer maintenance
  • Prompt reporting of equipment faults to HOA/Hotel Engineers, followed by approved repairs
  • Completion of Health Department logs as needed
  • Degreasing filters as necessary
  • Supply of all required pool chemicals
  • Deck cleaning and trash collection in the pool area
  • Photo uploads via our app
  • Pool pack and pump area maintenance
  • Arrangement of pool furniture

We proactively communicate with property managers to advise on necessary repairs or equipment replacements, from life rings to pool signs and other essential items.

We Are Always Ready to Service Your Commercial Swimming Pool
